creator: rodomar705@gmail.com
text: And here i am. I hope that this port will make in the port tree, sooner or later. Works wonderfully here on 10.3. The only problem for now is managing and upgrading the port itself, unfortunately. Having to patch the ports tree each time the tree is upgraded it's quite annoying. What's stopping the merge of the package itself? Just the patches? Maybe back porting the changes to let it work correctly with the current port tree would speedup the merge itself? Or it is just too hard/long to do it?
